like clock, hold, and reset to its parts. It ensures all components work

movement from cache memory to the ALU.

: The memory unit stores data and instructions. Older
CPUs used registers, but modern ones also have fast cache
memory. The CPU fetches data from RAM, ROM, or hard disks and
stores it in registers or cache during tasks.
